domains.name: configuration/projection
domains.note: Consumer-side in-memory projection of atlas-configurations tenant config-status outbox. No model.go / no resource.go -> DOM/SUB checklists N/A; FILE checklist run in full.

checks.name: Processor in processor.go
checks.evidence: No Processor/ProcessorImpl/NewProcessor in package; nothing to misplace.

checks.name: RestModel/Transform/JSON:API in rest.go
checks.evidence: envelope.go:17 TenantEnvelope is a wire decoder, not a JSON:API DTO; consumed model is external tenant.RestModel (state.go:16).

checks.name: Builder/Model/administrator/provider/state placement
checks.evidence: No Builder/domain Model/DB writes/database.Query; state.go:14 holds in-memory State store, nothing misplaced.

checks.name: Kafka producer stubbed in tests that emit
checks.evidence: No emit call sites in package or tests; consume-only handler.

changeUnderAudit.rationale: ReplayableEnd (libs/atlas-kafka/consumer/offsets.go:42) collapses retention-purged partitions to 0; caughtup.go:101 treats end==0 as trivially caught up, preventing the config-projection readiness wedge. No stale ReadEndOffsets callers remain.
